summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Spice POS Iteration 3 features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all role-specific nav changes, Staff CRUD, customer dialog, Bill page All tab with search, Chef KDS with served button and timestamps, Cashier 4-tab layout with totals and close-day.
critical_code_review_comments: All Iteration 3 features working as expected
Tables correctly sorted by sort_order (T1-T16 in natural order)
Staff CRUD with RBAC protection (owner cannot be modified/deleted via staff endpoints)
Chef served status correctly sets served_at and ready_at timestamps
Cashier totals endpoint returns correct payment_split breakdown
Close-day is idempotent (returns same record on repeat calls)
seed_data_creation: 16 tables (T1-T16) with sort_order, 30 menu items, staff members seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 complete. Key changes: (1) Owner nav: Staff replaces Expenses, (2) Captain nav: Tables/Running Orders/All Orders/Orders Closed (no Inventory), (3) Chef nav: Kitchen only with Live KDS and Orders tabs, (4) Cashier nav: Payments only with 4 tabs (In Progress/Completed/Cancelled/Today's Totals). Staff CRUD tested with add/edit/delete. Customer dialog on table selection captures name/mobile/notes. Bill page has All tab preselected, search auto-switches to All. Chef can mark items served with timestamps. Cashier totals shows payment split and close-day exports CSV.

backend: GET /api/tables returns tables in natural order (T1..T16) by sort_order ✓
Owner accounts cannot be modified/deleted via staff endpoints (returns 400) ✓
chef_status can be 'served'; sets served_at + ready_at ✓
frontend: Owner /owner/staff page: Add/Edit/Delete staff with role columns ✓
Captain nav: Tables/Running Orders/All Orders/Orders Closed (no Inventory) ✓
Captain table click → customer dialog with name/mobile/notes ✓
Captain Bill page: All tab preselected, search filters across categories ✓
Captain Bill page: minus/plus/trash buttons on pending items ✓
Chef KDS: Live KDS and Orders tabs ✓
Chef KDS: tick/cross/serve buttons with timestamps ✓
Cashier Today's Totals: total_collected, payment split cards, close day button ✓
